mapper.sql: id, threads, typeoferror, numberoferrors, inerrors, inallsamples
mapper.insert:
insert into errors
id,
threads,
typeoferror,
numberoferrors,
inerrors,
inallsamples,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{threads,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{typeoferror,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{numberoferrors,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{inerrors,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{inallsamples,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update errors
threads = #{threads,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
typeoferror = #{typeoferror,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
numberoferrors = #{numberoferrors,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inerrors = #{inerrors,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inallsamples = #{inallsamples,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update errors set threads = #{threads,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, typeoferror = #{typeoferror,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, numberoferrors = #{numberoferrors,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inerrors = #{inerrors,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inallsamples = #{inallsamples,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
